parameters.query:
INSERT INTO invoices (case_id, client_id, amount, currency, status, due_date, issued_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.case_id ? $json.case_id : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.client_id }},
  {{ $json.amount }},
  '{{ $json.currency.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  'pendiente',
  {{ $json.due_date ? "'" + $json.due_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, case_id, client_id, amount, currency, status, due_date;

INSERT INTO case_events (case_id, event_type, event_payload, created_by)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Insertar Factura').item.json.case_id ? $('Insertar Factura').item.json.case_id : 'NULL' }},
  'invoice_created',
  '{{ { invoice_id: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.id, amount: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.amount, currency: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.currency, due_date: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.due_date }.toJsonString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  'wf_facturacion'
)
RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'ok', invoice_id: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.id, amount: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.amount, due_date: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.due_date, payment_status: $('Insertar Factura').item.json.status } }}

parameters.query:
SELECT id, case_id, client_id, amount, currency, due_date
FROM invoices
WHERE status = 'pendiente'
  AND due_date IS NOT NULL
  AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY due_date ASC
LIMIT 300;

INSERT INTO case_events (case_id, event_type, event_payload, created_by)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.case_id ? $json.case_id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.payload.toJsonString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  'wf_facturacion_cron'
);
